# Nexus-Auto-OS: Universal Bi-Directional Diagnostic Framework
**Lead Architect:** Gunner Blake Carr  
**Credentials:** B.S. Systems Engineering & Software Development, Colorado Technical University  
**Specializations:** Industrial Automation | Cybersecurity | Automotive Diagnostics

---

## 🛑 The Business Case: "Interoperability = Profit"
Current automotive diagnostics are fragmented. A shop needs $20,000 in tools to talk to Ford, Chevy, and Tesla. **Nexus-Auto-OS** breaks these silos by providing a single, bi-directional API. 

**Why Invest?**
* **For Apple/Tech Giants:** The first to provide a "Consumer-to-ECU" bridge for CarPlay/iOS integration.
* **For Fleet Owners:** Real-time security auditing (Nessus/Metasploit) to prevent cyber-hijacking of autonomous vehicles.
* **For Technicians:** One platform for every make, reducing overhead and increasing bay turnover by 40%.

---

## 🛠 Features & Badges
![Engineering](https://img.shields.io/badge/Engineer-Systems-blue?style=for-the-badge)
![Software](https://img.shields.io/badge/Developer-Software-green?style=for-the-badge)
![Security](https://img.shields.io/badge/Audit-CyberSecurity-red?style=for-the-badge)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL--3.0-gold?style=for-the-badge)

* **Bi-Directional Engine:** Python-based control for CAN FD and DoIP.
* **Security Suite:** Integrated Wireshark and Metasploit modules.
* **Cross-Platform:** Deployable via Docker on iOS, Android, and Windows.
